case_title: ROBINSON, PAMELA vs. CENTRO FAMILIAR et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRO FAMILIAR HOMELESS COALITION BENEFITS JUAN OYARZUN, IND. & DBA CENTRO FAMILIAR & HOMELESS COALITION BENEFITS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRO FAMILIAR HOMELESS COALITION BENEFITS JUAN OYARZUN, IND. & DBA CENTRO FAMILIAR & HOMELESS COALITION BENEFITS $1,889.76 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,969.76
